title: Amara's Sound Adventure
synopsis: Baby Amara discovers different sounds around her home, counting from one to five as she explores musical instruments, animals, and everyday noises that create beautiful visual patterns in the air.

pages.text: One drum goes BOOM! Amara hits the big drum with her hands.

illustration.description: A baby girl with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes sits next to a colorful drum. Thick jagged orange and red lines burst from the drum in circular patterns, representing the loud BOOM sound as visible vibrations.
illustration.alt: Baby Amara playing drum with sound waves visible

pages.text: Two bells ring DING DONG! Pretty silver sounds dance in the air.

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes holds two small bells. Delicate silver and blue wavy lines spiral upward like ribbons, showing the gentle bell sounds as flowing musical streams.
illustration.alt: Amara ringing bells with musical sound waves

pages.text: Three cats say MEOW MEOW MEOW! Soft fuzzy sounds float like clouds.

illustration.description: Three fluffy cats surround Amara who has long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes. Puffy pink and purple cloud-like shapes with tiny dots emerge from each cat's mouth, representing their soft meowing sounds.
illustration.alt: Amara with three meowing cats and visible sound clouds

pages.text: Four birds chirp TWEET TWEET TWEET TWEET! Quick yellow sounds zip around.

illustration.description: Four colorful birds perch near Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes. Bright yellow zigzag lines dart quickly through the air like lightning bolts, showing the fast chirping sounds as energetic streaks.
illustration.alt: Amara listening to chirping birds with zippy sound lines

pages.text: Five bubbles go POP POP POP POP POP! Tiny sparkles burst everywhere!

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes claps as five soap bubbles burst around her. Small star-shaped sparkles in rainbow colors explode outward from each popping bubble, creating a magical sound display.
illustration.alt: Amara with popping bubbles creating sparkly sound effects

metadata.illustrationStyle: sound made visible, wavy lines for music, jagged lines for crashes, dots for whispers, synesthesia inspired, seeing sound, color and shape for noise, vibration visual

questions.question: What sound does the drum make?
questions.explanation: The drum makes a loud BOOM sound when Amara hits it!

questions.question: How many cats say meow?
questions.explanation: Three cats say MEOW MEOW MEOW with soft fuzzy sounds!

questions.question: What happens to the bubbles?
questions.explanation: The five bubbles go POP POP POP and make sparkly sounds!
